name: electron-audio-recorder
description: macOS desktop app to record system audio and store recordings locally
author: Electron Audio Recorder

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Required by Chromium to capture system audio via screen sharing.
extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Required by Chromium for getDisplayMedia even when only audio is captured.
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: Required to capture system audio via the macOS screen-share dialog.
